stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Using sample Table 10.4.A to determine which Dangerous Goods may be stowed next to each other in an aircraft`s cargo compartment. Which statement correctly describes an acceptable loading configuration?

options.a: One package classified “4.2” next to one package classified “1”.
options.b: One package classified “1” next to one package classified “2”.
options.c: One package classified “4.3” next to one package classified “5.1”.
options.d: One package classified “5.1” next to one package classified “3” .
